query:
INSERT INTO deployment_vector_index_states (
                    deployment_id,
                    store_name,
                    tracked_row_count,
                    vector_index_created_at,
                    last_index_attempt_at,
                    last_optimized_at,
                    created_at,
                    updated_at
                ) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, NULL, NULL, $5, $5)
